seoTitle: Allandale vs Alleena — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Allandale and Alleena. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Allandale and Alleena.
heading: Allandale vs Alleena — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Allandale, New South Wales and Alleena, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Allandale has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Alleena (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Allandale or Alleena safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Allandale has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Alleena scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Allandale scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Alleena scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Allandale or Alleena?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Allandale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
